title: Segro board U-turns on £14bn takeover bid by US rival Prologis
description: UK warehouse landlord says board unanimous in recommendation to accept ‘best and final offer’
content:
The board of the UK warehouse landlord Segro has U-turned and said it would be willing to accept a £14bn takeover by Segro’s bigger US rival, Prologis, in a deal that would be one of the largest foreign takeovers of a UK-listed company.
In the latest... [3567 chars]

title: Woman, 70, charged with murder of British expat Karen Carter in France
description: Public prosecutor for the region said suspect had been initially arrested shortly after the murder on 29 April last year
content:
A 70-year-old woman has been charged with the murder of Karen Carter, the British expat found dead in south-western France last year, according to reports.
According to the Dordogne Libre and others, the woman was charged on 2 July with Carter’s murd... [2384 chars]

title: Alejandro Garnacho: Aston Villa agree loan deal for Chelsea winger
description: Aston Villa agree a loan deal for Chelsea winger Alejandro Garnacho until the end of the 2026-27 season, with an obligation to buy.
content:
Aston Villa have agreed a loan deal for Chelsea winger Alejandro Garnacho until the end of the 2026-27 season, with an obligation to buy.
The 22-year-old has already completed a medical in Birmingham and has pre-agreed a four-year contract at Villa P... [1134 chars]

title: London loses again: FTSE 100 landlord Segro will be missed
description: Doubly depressing takeover by a US buyer deprives the UK market of a property company that is genuinely different
content:
For a few hours on Wednesday, it seemed possible we were about to witness a rare stock market event: a FTSE 100 company holding out against a hostile raider from the US and defying some of its own large shareholders to defend its independence.

title: Casemiro: Inter Miami being investigated for tampering after signing ex-Manchester United midfielder
description: Major League Soccer says it is investigating allegations of tampering by Inter Miami after the club signed Brazil midfielder Casemiro.
content:
Major League Soccer says it is investigating allegations of tampering by Inter Miami after the club signed Brazil midfielder Casemiro.
